workspace-layout-bg-color.description: Background color of the workspace layout shell (visible around the main card).

workspace-layout-card-bg-color.description: Background color of the workspace layout's main scrollable card.

workspace-layout-header-bg-color.description: Background color of the sticky page header inside the workspace layout card.

workspace-layout-header-border-bottom.description: Divider line under the sticky page header.

workspace-layout-header-scroll-shadow.description: Soft drop shadow cast below the sticky page header when content is scrolled past it.

workspace-layout-footer-bg-color.description: Background color of the sticky page footer inside the workspace layout card.

workspace-layout-footer-border-top.description: Divider line above the sticky page footer.

workspace-layout-footer-scroll-shadow.description: Soft drop shadow cast above the sticky page footer when content is scrolled past it.

workspace-layout-mobile-toggle-top.description: Vertical offset of the auto-rendered mobile hamburger button from the top of the layout.

workspace-layout-mobile-toggle-left.description: Horizontal offset of the auto-rendered mobile hamburger button from the left of the layout.
